results.name: unique-type-exclusion
results.description: Cards that say "non-type" where no other card does that for that type.

results.name: unique type line
results.description: No other card has this same type line. Acorn, playtest, and rebalanced cards may count as unique, but they don't make non-acorn, non-playtest, non-rebalanced cards stop counting as unique.

results.name: universal type change
results.description: Cards that turn every type A into type B. Might be just one player or all, just the battlefield or not.

results.name: un-iverse
results.description: A separate multiverse in which the silver-bordered Un-sets take place. Characters from Magic's normal multiverse may also exist in the Un-iverse.

results.name: un-keyword
results.description: Keywords that are only seen in silver border.

results.name: unnamed roman plane
results.description: A Roman-inspired plane indicated in several characters' backstories.

results.name: unnoted tracked information
results.description: Spells or abilities that require tracking events without explicitly noting them. See also [noted tracked information](noted-tracked-information).

results.name: unprinted token
results.description: Cards whose tokens haven't yet been printed in paper.

results.name: un-set mechanics
results.description: Card tags showing mechanics that (at least nowadays) only show up in un-sets.

results.name: unstable killbot
results.description: Beep boop! 🤖 Unstable killbots share the same collector number but have different names.

results.name: unstable secret base
results.description: There are five Secret Base cards in Unstable. They share the same collector number but have different art, flavor text and watermark, matching each of the five Bablovian factions.

results.name: unstable variant
results.description: Cards in Unstable that have multiple versions with the same collector number.

results.name: unstoppable
results.description: Assign combat damage as though the creature weren't blocked. Also known as super-trample. See also [gives unstoppable](gives-unstoppable).

results.name: unsundered source (ffxiv)
results.description: The source from FFXIV before it was split into fourteen shards

results.name: untapped matters-self
results.description: Permanents that care about being untapped. For cards that care about other untapped permanents, see [synergy-untapped](synergy-untapped). For cards that carea about the action of untapping, see [inspired](inspired).

results.name: untracked indefinite effect
results.description: Effects that last forever but aren't tracked by anything. For these purposes we're not counting ETB clones.

results.name: un type line
results.description: A card with a type only found in silver border or on Acorn cards.

results.name: unusual casing
results.description: These cards have unusual letter casing in their text.

results.name: updog
results.description: not much, what's up with you?

results.name: upkeep cost
results.description: Cards that ask you to pay some kind of cost on your upkeep step.

results.name: upside down
results.description: The art or a major feature is upside down.

results.name: urborg
results.description: An island of Dominaria known as a powerful source of black mana.

results.name: ureni
results.description: Ureni, nonbinary spirit dragon of the Temur clan.

results.name: uril ability
results.description: An ability in which the P/T of one or more creatures can increase based on the number of aura attached to one creature outside of the aura's effects of being attached. See also [ethereal armor](ethereal-armor).

results.name: ursa
results.description: Zuko's mother.

results.name: urza
results.description: One of the original protagonists of Magic, and brother of Mishra.

results.name: urza's symbol
results.description: The symbol of Urza, most notably seen on Karn's chest.

results.name: useless in singleton formats
results.description: Cards that have little to no use in formats that are Singleton (allowing only one of most cards save for basic lands) such as commander

results.name: useless island
results.description: The island on Ixalan where Jace planeswalked to after Bolas defeated him on Amonkhet.

results.name: uthros
results.description: Sothera's fifth planet and its only gas giant, used as a research site by the Uthros Combine.
